FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Skills update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Changes all skill-based calculations to use the same formulas as Specialists & Governors. Additionally, adds a merc heal-rate bonus from encampments to nearby settlements.

patchNoteLines.li: Updates skill-based calculations to use the same formulas as Specialists & Governors
Encampments now produce a medicine-based boost to merc heal rate to nearby settlements

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Updates
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Updates the code to account for changes to Empire Refactored and Specialists & Governors.

patchNoteLines.li: Many code updates to keep up with the base mod and other submods
